data.body: EPIC CLOSE-OUT (2026-07-10). All 10 children closed, 10/10 with completion signatures. Bands complete: A (A1 *.retired, A2 RC2b horizon-safe replay, A3 live-store remediation + fsck --repair), B (B1 Phase-3 baseline consumer swap flipped + live-validated, 30 consecutive clean shadow passes divergent=0), C (C1 conflict signal, C2 hard-delete->re-create, C3 allowlist-drop alert, C4 429 backoff), D (D1 comprehensive live matrix vs project REB: 12 passed / 0 failed / 0 leaked artifacts, guaranteed bilateral teardown, ADR 0037, report script scripts/run_live_matrix.py — Gerrit changes 455 + 462 MERGED). Risk #5 (single-hop status transitions) remains explicitly accepted/out of scope per the epic body. SCOPE NOTE: story eca4 (module-loading refactor, appended by the 2026-07-08 audit, never in this epic's ACs) was re-scoped: detached from this epic per its own scope boundary (maintainability work does not live here), parked as idea with a BLOCK plan review + recorded positions on its six open design decisions, relates_to retained for provenance. EMERGENT: bug forgivable-nerdy-genet (7a41) — review-bot box transient disk-full fail-closed the LLM-Review gate during this close-out (diagnosed via VOTER_ERROR journal, recovered via /rerun); discovered_from d01e. GC follow-up 536b remains parked as idea (unparented).
